cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. The key here is to look at all the times he was seen doing other activities and find the gaps between them. So, Steven woke up at 7am. Then Ashley saw him at the yoga studio from 7am to 10am. That means he was there until 10am. After that, the next activity is William seeing him at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So between 10am and 1pm, what was he doing? The problem doesn't mention any activity there, so maybe that's a possible window. Then, after the library, he was at the office from 2pm to 3pm with Jennifer. Then Michael saw him at the theater from 3pm to 7pm. After that, Mary saw him at the train station from 7pm to 10pm. The gas station is closed after 10pm, so he had to go before that. Looking at the options, option C is 10am to 1pm. That's the first gap after the yoga studio and before the library. Let me check if there's any other possible times.
